name: downloads-organizer
description: npm command runner for the macOS Downloads Organizer (launchd agent + read-only dashboard).

scripts.status: launchctl print gui/$(id -u)/com.obirimensah.organize-downloads 2>/dev/null | grep 'state =' || echo 'not loaded'; echo "Downloads top-level file count: $(find "$HOME/Downloads" -maxdepth 1 -mindepth 1 | wc -l | tr -d ' ')"
scripts.reload: launchctl bootout gui/$(id -u)/com.obirimensah.organize-downloads 2>/dev/null; launchctl bootstrap gui/$(id -u) "$HOME/Library/LaunchAgents/com.obirimensah.organize-downloads.plist" && echo reloaded
